1000626749.english: You are the agent of light! Angel! Angel! Azazel!

1000626750.english: - People gathered together and prayed to Azazel, and the excitement of the gathering grew.
1000626750.korean: - 사람들은 저마다 손을 모아 아자젤에게 기도를 올리고, 집회의 열기는 갈수록 더해갔다.

1000626751.english: - The story I heard from Azazel about the old Kohei sect was only fragmentary, but I could clearly see its danger.
1000626751.korean: - 아자젤에게서 들은 예전 코헤이 교단에 대한 이야기는 단편적인 것 뿐이었지만, 그 위험성만은 충분히 알 수 있었다.

1000626752.english: - A woman approached me as I was hurriedly taking pictures here and there in the church.
1000626752.korean: - 서둘러 교회의 이곳저곳을 사진으로 남기는 내게 한 여성이 다가왔다.

1000626754.english: - The woman I had seen outside a moment ago grabbed my wrist. Hearing her voice, the people around me turned to look at me.
1000626754.korean: - 아까 밖에서 봤던 여성이 내 손목을 잡아챘다. 그 목소리에 주변 사람들도 내게 시선을 향했다.

1000626755.english: This person just took a picture of the people in front of me. This is a violation of their portrait rights! Hand me the camera!
1000626755.korean: 이 사람이 지금 앞 분들의 사진을 찍었어요. 이거 초상권 침해에요! 카메라 내놔요!

1000626757.english: - I barely managed to shake off the crowd and get out, but the entrance was already blocked.
1000626757.korean: - 간신히 사람들을 뿌리치고 밖으로 나왔지만, 이미 입구는 막혀있었다.

1000626758.english: Unidentified person found. Checking the believer database... This believer does not exist.
1000626758.korean: 신원 미확인 거수자 발견. 신도 데이터베이스 확인 중... 존재하지 않는 신도입니다.

1000626759.english: Please tell me the Ten Commandments of the Church. 5... 4...

1000626760.english: Heresy discovered. Heresy discovered. Heresy discovered.
1000626760.korean: 이단 발견. 이단 발견. 이단 발견.

1000626761.english: - Just as he was about to sling Tomo over his shoulder and flee, the AGS guard was split in two with a sharp metallic clang.
1000626761.korean: - 황급히 토모를 들쳐메고 도망가려는 순간 날카로운 금속성과 함께 경비 AGS가 반으로 갈라졌다.

1000626762.english: - And then... a woman wearing nothing but a coat appeared before us.
1000626762.korean: - 그리고... 알몸에 코트를 걸친 여자가 우리 앞에 나타났다.

1000626763.english: never imagined our reunion would happen like this. It has been a long time, Commander.
1000626763.korean: 그대와의 재회가 이런식으로 이루어질 줄은 몰랐군. 정말 오랜만이오, 사령관.

1000626764.english: - No matter how unconventional the Orca members' attire was, it was rare for the unit's commanders to wear daring outfits in public.
1000626764.korean: - 오르카 대원들의 복장이 아무리 자유분방 하다지만, 적어도 부대의 지휘관들이 공개석상에서 과감한 복장을 입는 일은 드물었다.

1000626765.english: - But that dragon... no, wait. Given that it is a dragon, it must have carried various psychological burdens. After all, it seems that dressing in revealing attire relieves stress, as several members like Fenrir, Lilith, Elven, and Hongryeon have mentioned.
1000626765.korean: - 그런데 그 용이... 아니지. 그 용이니만큼 여러가지 심적인 부담이 있었을 것이다. 펜리르, 리리스, 엘븐, 홍련 등 여러 대원들이 말하길 개방적인 차림을 하면 스트레스가 풀린다는 모양이니까.

1000626766.english: - But even though Dragon holds a high rank in Orca, it would have been difficult for her to dress like that in real life. Since this virtual space happened to exist, she probably saw it as an opportunity. Just as you’d expect from the strategy of the Invincible Dragon who once led the Navy...!
1000626766.korean: - 하지만 오르카에서 상당한 지위를 갖고 있는 용은, 아무리그래도 현실에서 그런 차림을 하기는 힘들었을 것이다. 마침 이런 가상 공간이 있으니 기회로 삼았겠지. 역시 해군을 이끌던 무적의 용의 전략...!

1000626767.english: P-Commander... The way you're staring at me like that is a little...
1000626767.korean: 사, 사령관... 그대가 그렇게 빤히 보는 것은, 조금...

1000626769.english: I was able to come here because Skadi lent me her communicator, but I suppose this is just a glitch caused by the fact that it’s an old model.
1000626769.korean: 스카디가 자신의 접속기를 양보해주어 이곳에 올 수 있었으나, 오래된 접속기라 그런지 오류로 인해 이렇게 된 것일 뿐이오.

1000626770.english: I will try to hide myself as much as possible, so you don't have to worry too much.
1000626770.korean: 가급적 몸을 숨기고 다닐테니, 너무 걱정하지 않아도 되오.

1000626772.english: - I hurriedly covered Tomo's mouth with both hands.
1000626772.korean: - 나는 황급히 토모의 입을 두 손으로 막았다.

1000626773.english: Ahem... I am a warrior by nature. I would never hesitate to use my sword for you out of mere shame.
1000626773.korean: 흠흠… 소관은 본디 무인. 고작 부끄러움 따위로 그대를 위해 칼을 쓰는 것을 망설일 일은 없소.

1000626774.english: I will take charge of this place.

1000626775.english: Hahaha, are you playing tag again?

1000626776.english: - With the help of Dragon, we were able to safely shake off the security robots and escape.
1000626776.korean: - 용의 도움으로 우린 무사히 경비 로봇들을 뿌리치고 달아날 수 있었다.

1000626779.english: - As Tomo slumped to the floor, a vibration was felt in the pocket.
1000626779.korean: - 토모가 바닥에 털썩 쓰러지는 것과 동시에 주머니에서 진동이 느껴졌다.

1000626781.english: I just got in touch with Assemblyman Hatomori. Please come to 221 Umihikizawa, Tamashi right now.
1000626781.korean: 하토모리 의원에게 방금 연락이 닿았어. 지금 당장 타마시 우미히키자와 221번지로 와줘.

1000626782.english: Wow! Are you going to a congressman's house?

1000626783.english: - I headed to the address Sherlock had given me, along with Tomo, who had revived in an instant.
1000626783.korean: - 순식간에 부활한 토모와 함께 셜록이 전해준 주소로 향했다.

1000626785.english: - 221 Umihikizawa. A huge traditional mansion, like the Kasahane-gumi, stood there. Sherlock was waiting for us in front of it.
1000626785.korean: - 우미히키자와 221번지. 그곳엔 카사하네구미와 같은 거대한 전통식 저택이 서 있었다. 셜록이 그 앞에서 우리를 기다리고 있었다.

1000626788.english: The Kohei Cult? I think I've heard of it... but did you take a picture?
1000626788.korean: 코헤이 교단? 들어본 것 같긴한데... 사진은 찍었나?

1000626789.english: Hehehe, Watson got kicked out with Tomo for taking pictures!
1000626789.korean: 에헤헷, 왓슨이 사진 찍다가 토모랑 같이 쫓겨났어!

1000626790.english: Sigh... Well, at least it doesn't look like anyone got hurt, so that's a relief. It's a shame there aren't many photos, but just figuring out which church it is is a big achievement in itself.
1000626790.korean: 하아... 그래도 다친 것 같진 않으니 다행이군. 사진이 별로 없는 건 아쉽지만, 어떤 교회인지 알아낸 것 만으로도 큰 성과다.

1000626791.english: I received a reply from Representative Hatomori saying that he had a document he really wanted to give me.
1000626791.korean: 나는 하토모리 의원에게서 꼭 전해주고 싶은 문서가 있다는 답장을 받았다.

1000626792.english: Well... we'll have to wait and see. Even though I revealed that I'm a reporter, I don't have a good feeling about you suddenly handing over important documents.
1000626792.korean: 글쎄... 그건 봐야 알겠지. 아무리 내가 기자라고 밝혔어도, 덜컥 중요한 문서를 넘기겠다니 느낌이 좋진 않아.

1000626795.english: I've been hearing that sound since elementary school, so it doesn't hurt. Then let's go.
1000626795.korean: 그 소리는 초등학교 때부터 들어서 노데미지다. 그럼 가지.

1000626796.english: - Sherlock pressed the button next to the front door.
1000626796.korean: - 셜록은 대문 옆에 달린 버튼을 눌렀다.

1000626797.english: Hello. This is Reporter Kimura from BHK, contacting you.
1000626797.korean: 안녕하십니까. 연락 드렸던 BHK의 키무라 기자입니다.

1000626798.english: - After waiting a little while, a woman wearing a kimono came out to greet us.
1000626798.korean: - 조금 기다리자 기모노를 입은 여성이 우리를 맞이하러 나왔다.

1000626799.english: Hello, Reporter Kimura. I am Nadeshiko, a member of this household.
1000626799.korean: 안녕하세요, 키무라 기자님. 저는 이 집의 식솔 나데시코라고 합니다.

1000626802.english: - Following Nadeshiko, I entered a traditional mansion like the Kasahane-gumi.
1000626802.korean: - 나데시코를 따라 카사하네구미와 같은 전통 저택 안으로 들어섰다.

1000626803.english: - Paintings were hanging on the walls here as well. Paintings of pigeons and the painting of magpies and pigeons together that I saw at Kasahane-gumi also caught my eye.
1000626803.korean: - 이곳에도 벽 곳곳에 그림들이 걸려있었다. 비둘기의 그림들과 카사하네구미에서 봤던 까치와 비둘기가 함께 있는 그림들도 눈에 띈다.

1000626805.english: - Nadeshiko, kneeling in the hallway, opened the door for me. I walked past her—her hands clasped respectfully and her head bowed—and stepped inside the room.
1000626805.korean: - 복도에 무릎을 꿇은 나데시코가 문을 열어주었다. 정중히 손을 모으고 고개를 숙인 그녀의 앞을 지나 방 안으로 들어섰다.

1000626806.english: Hello, Member of the House of Representatives Hatomori. I am- uh...?

1000626808.english: - neat room with green tatami mats. A painting of a pigeon with scrawled writing hangs on the pure white wall.
1000626808.korean: - 초록색 다다미가 깔린 깔끔한 방. 새하얀 벽엔 휘갈겨진 글자가 새겨진 비둘기 그림이 걸려있다.

1000626809.english: - As if waiting for us, two teacups sit on the table in the center of the room. And next to them...
1000626809.korean: - 우리를 기다리고 있었던 듯, 방 가운데의 탁자엔 찻잔 두 개가 놓여 있다. 그리고 그 옆엔...

1000626811.english: - Next to the table, a figure who appeared to be Assemblyman Hatomori was lying on the floor. The tatami mats were soaked in blood and stained red.
1000626811.korean: - 탁자 옆엔 하토모리 의원으로 보이는 인물이 바닥에 쓰러져있었다. 다다미가 피를 머금어 붉게 젖어 있다.

1000626812.english: - Sherlock ran toward Assemblyman Hatomori, whose face was pale and lips were blue.
1000626812.korean: - 창백한 얼굴에 입술이 시퍼런 하토모리 의원을 향해 셜록이 달려갔다.

1000626814.english: - Sherlock placed his hand on Hatomori's neck and shook his head heavily.
1000626814.korean: - 셜록은 손으로 하토모리의 목을 짚더니 무겁게 고개를 저었다.

1000626815.english: Jo, you were talking to me just a moment ago...?
1000626815.korean: 조, 조금 전까지 나랑 통화하고 있었는데...?

1000626816.english: You were drinking tea here just moments ago...! I, I wasn't!
1000626816.korean: 바, 방금 전까지 이곳에서 차를 마시고 계셨어요...! 저, 저는 아니에요!

1000626817.english: Uh, what should I... right. D-report to the police...
1000626817.korean: 어, 어떻게 해야... 그래. 겨, 경찰에 신고를...

1000626818.english: - Sherlock, who had been in a panic, slowly regained his composure.
1000626818.korean: - 패닉에 빠졌던 셜록이 천천히 침착함을 되찾았다.

1000626819.english: Ah, I get it. Let's sort out the situation first...

1000626820.english: It's 4:10 PM right now... It was only about an hour ago that I spoke with Assemblyman Hatomori.
1000626820.korean: 지금이 16시 10분... 내가 하토모리 의원과 통화했던 게 고작 1시간 정도 전이었어.

1000626821.english: Looking at the call records... around 3:20 PM. Then I called you guys to join, and we probably entered the mansion around 4:00 PM...
1000626821.korean: 통화 기록을 보면... 15시 20분경. 그리고 너희를 불러 합류했고, 저택에 들어온 게 아마 16시쯤...

1000626822.english: About 10 minutes after speaking with the reporter, he told me to get ready to serve the guests. I, I...
1000626822.korean: 기, 기자님과 통화하고 10분 쯤 뒤에 저에게 손님 대접 준비를 하라고 말씀하셨어요. 저, 저는...

1000626825.english: Oh, it's nothing. But it's not me! Please believe me...!
1000626825.korean: 아, 아무것도 아니에요. 그렇지만 저는 아니에요! 제발 믿어주세요...!

1000626826.english: Calm down. First... call the police.

1000626828.english: Judging by the lack of any traces inside the room, the culprit must have quickly murdered Representative Hatomori in the meantime…
1000626828.korean: 방 안에 별다른 흔적이 보이지 않는 걸로 보아... 범인은 그 사이에 빠르게 하토모리 의원을 살해…

1000626829.english: - Kimura hesitated for a moment and stopped speaking.

1000626832.english: - Tomo, with his arms crossed and his eyes closed, let out a strange groan.
1000626832.korean: - 팔짱을 끼고 눈을 감은 토모가 이상한 신음소리를 냈다.

1000626833.english: Watson, wait a minute. A Bioroid is a living computer, right?
1000626833.korean: 왓슨, 잠깐만. 바이오로이드는 생체 컴퓨터라고 하잖아?

1000626834.english: Right now, Tomo is focusing all her attention on solving the mystery.
1000626834.korean: 지금 토모는 온 신경을 추리에 쏟고 있는 거야.

1000626835.english: The culprit is... the same culprit as the Red Arena murder case!

1000626837.english: Here, look at the wound. The first one was a deep puncture to the right lung.
1000626837.korean: 여기, 상처를 봐. 제일 먼저 오른쪽 폐를 깊숙히 찔렸어.

1000626838.english: Since there are no signs of a struggle, this must have been the first place he stabbed her.
1000626838.korean: 저항의 흔적이 없는 걸 보니까, 단번에 여기를 제일 먼저 찔렸을 거야.

1000626839.english: ...It's the same method used to kill Yamazaki Tooru.

1000626840.english: Right. And since he was stabbed in the left lung, it must have filled with blood, right? Then the killer laid Representative Hatomori down on his right side like this.
1000626840.korean: 응응. 그리고 왼쪽 폐를 찔렸으니까, 거기 피가 찼겠지? 그 다음에 범인은 하토모리 의원을 이렇게, 오른쪽으로 눕혔어.

1000626841.english: So, blood filled the other lung too, and I couldn't even scream.
1000626841.korean: 그래서 반대쪽 폐에도 피가 차고, 소리도 지르지 못한 거야.

1000626843.english: But, unlike last time, I don't think there are any personal feelings.
1000626843.korean: 그런데, 저번이랑은 달리 사적인 감정은 없는 것 같아.

1000626845.english: It's just a hunch, but... last time, there were traces of the victim's mouth being roughly covered to prevent them from spitting up blood, right? They didn't even lay them down to fill both lungs with blood. That's probably why they died more slowly and painfully.
1000626845.korean: 이건 그냥 느낌이지만... 저번엔, 피해자가 피를 토하지 못하도록 거칠게 입을 막은 흔적이 있었잖아? 양쪽 폐에 피를 채우려고 눕히지도 않았고. 아마 그래서 더 천천히, 고통스럽게 죽었을 거야.

1000626846.english: But this time is different. Both lungs were filled with blood, and with a lack of blood and oxygen, it probably didn’t take long before he lost consciousness. There are no other signs of injury either.
1000626846.korean: 그런데 이번엔 달라. 양쪽 폐에 피가 가득 차고, 혈액과 산소가 부족해 정신을 잃기까지 얼마 걸리지도 않았을 거야. 다른 해를 끼친 흔적도 보이지 않아.

1000626847.english: Hehe, even Tomo doesn't know that much!

1000626849.english: Right. It's all related to the Kirishima Law.
1000626849.korean: 그래. 전부 키리시마 법과 관련되어 있어.

1000626850.english: Sherlock! The culprit might still be around here!
1000626850.korean: 셜록! 아직 범인은 이 근처에 있을지도!

1000626852.english: Here, here. There are footprints in the corner. Looks like the idiot criminal came in with muddy feet!
1000626852.korean: 여기여기. 구석에 발자국이 있어. 바보 범인이 흙발로 들어왔었나봐!

1000626853.english: And there's a gap in the ceiling plank! Hahaha, looks like they jumped from here. Let's hurry and chase after them!
1000626853.korean: 그리고 천장에 판자 하나가 열려 있어! 꺄하핫, 여기서 점프했나 봐. 어서 쫓아가자!

1000626854.english: - We also crawled up, following Tomo who had kicked the wall and disappeared up to the ceiling.
1000626854.korean: - 벽을 차고 천장 위로 사라진 토모를 따라 우리도 기어 올라갔다.

1000626856.english: Look here. The footprints are connected.

1000626857.english: - The space between the ceiling and the roof. Tomo followed the footprints inward.
1000626857.korean: - 천장과 지붕 사이의 공간. 토모는 발자국을 따라 안쪽으로 향했다.

1000626859.english: That's right in the middle of the ceiling. Is there a hole in the roof or something?
1000626859.korean: 거긴 천장 한가운데잖아. 지붕에 구멍이라도 나 있어?

1000626860.english: No, no? Hahaha, it suddenly disappeared!

1000626861.english: Damn it, am I turning into a ghost or something?

1000626862.english: And there's a strange piece of paper lying here, but I don't know what it is!
1000626862.korean: 그리고 여기 이상한 종이가 떨어져있는데, 뭔지는 모르겠어!

1000626864.english: First, go pick that up. Let's go down and search the area.
1000626864.korean: 일단 그거 주워 와. 내려가서 주변을 수색해보자.

1000626867.english: - Tomo and Kimura, who had come down from the ceiling, went to search the surroundings. I tried to follow them, but I ended up seeing silver hair flowing down from a gap in the ceiling.
1000626867.korean: - 천장에서 내려온 토모와 키무라는 주변을 수색하러 갔다. 나도 그들을 따라가려 했지만 천장의 틈에서 은색 머리카락이 흘러내리는 걸 보고 말았다.

1000626868.english: - I quickly picked up my hair and hid it, then waited until Tomo and Kimura disappeared into the distance. Probably on the ceiling...
1000626868.korean: - 재빨리 머리카락을 주워 숨긴 뒤, 토모와 키무라가 멀리 사라질 때까지 기다렸다. 아마 천장에는...

1000626869.english: I thought I was going to get caught.

1000626870.english: Th-that can't be true! Even if it's virtual reality, how could I... a human...
1000626870.korean: 그, 그럴리가 없지 않은가! 아무리 가상현실이라지만, 내가 어떻게 인간을...

1000626872.english: I had entered the room with the commander, but someone was watching him from the ceiling. So I hurriedly climbed up to the ceiling.
1000626872.korean: 사령관과 함께 방에 들어왔었는데, 천장 위에서 누군가 사령관을 보고 있었다. 그래서 서둘러 천장에 올라갔다.

1000626873.english: But, uh... I forgot that there was dirt on my boots.
1000626873.korean: 그런데, 그... 부츠에 흙이 묻었던 것을 깜빡-

1000626874.english: ...I, I overlooked it. I am ashamed, Commander...

1000626875.english: He was wearing a mask, so all I could tell was that he was a man with a lean build. I was about to chase after him when... Tomo showed up, and I was caught off guard—
1000626875.korean: 복면을 쓰고 있어서 날렵한 몸의 남성이란 것만 알 수 있었다. 쫓으려다가 그... 토모가 올라오는 바람에 당황-

1000626876.english: ...I, I missed it because I was watching the situation.

1000626877.english: - You might think it’s ridiculous to go out of your way to change a word... but when you see him sweating bullets and flustered, you can’t help but feel the same way.
1000626877.korean: - 굳이 단어를 바꾸는 것에 어이없을 법도 하지만... 식은땀을 흘리며 쩔쩔 매는 모습을 보면 그럴 마음도 들지 않는다.

1000626878.english: I will gladly accept the punishment for failure...

1000626880.english: ......Thank you, Commander. I will make sure this never happens again.
1000626880.korean: ......고맙다, 사령관. 다시는 이런 일 없도록 하겠다.

1000626881.english: - It feels a bit like cheating, but it's a shame we could have solved it all at once here.
1000626881.korean: - 조금 반칙같기는 하지만 여기서 한 번에 해결할 수 있었는데 아쉽군.

1000626882.english: That is not the case. It is only natural that we are by the commander's side.
1000626882.korean: 그렇지 않다. 사령관 곁에 우리들이 있는 것은 당연한 일이다.

1000626883.english: No one thinks it is a foul.

1000626884.english: I understand. I remember it clearly, so there is no problem.
1000626884.korean: 알겠다. 확실하게 기억하고 있으니 문제 없다.

1000626885.english: Understood. I, I'll risk my life...!

1000626887.english: - I ruffled Lace's hair and headed out to the yard to join Tomo and Sherlock.
1000626887.korean: - 레이스의 머리를 슬쩍 헝클여주고 마당에 나가있는 토모와 셜록에게 향했다.

1000626889.english: - Leaving the disappearing Wraith behind, I headed toward Tomo and Sherlock who were out in the yard.
1000626889.korean: - 사라지는 레이스를 뒤로 하고 마당에 나가 있는 토모와 셜록에게 향했다.

1000626890.english: - As if she had found something, Tomo suddenly shouted.

1000626891.english: Wow, I found it! It looks like the culprit stepped in some dirt while climbing over a fence around here.
1000626891.korean: 우왓, 찾았어! 범인은 이 근처에서 담을 넘어 오다가 흙을 밟은 것 같아.

1000626892.english: Judging by the size and stride of its footprints... it's probably around 180cm tall. But judging by its shallow depth, it must either be incredibly light or incredibly agile!
1000626892.korean: 발자국 크기와 보폭으로 봐서... 키는 180cm 정도야. 그런데 깊이가 이렇게 얇은 걸로 봐서는, 체중이 말도 안되게 가볍거나 몸놀림이 엄청 뛰어날거야!

1000626894.english: - Did you find any traces of Wraith?

1000626895.english: - While I was wondering how to overcome this difficulty, the police arrived with the sound of a siren.
1000626895.korean: - 이 난관을 어떻게 돌파해야하나 고민하던 중, 사이렌 소리와 함께 경찰이 도착했다.

1000626896.english: We've received a report and are on the move! City Guard, a police service with healthy citizens and Bioroids!
1000626896.korean: 신고를 받고 출동했다네! 건전한 시민, 바이오로이드와 함께하는 경찰 서비스, 시티가드!

1000626898.english: Yes, you! Sherlock Kimura is under emergency arrest as a suspect in the Hatomori House of Representatives murder case!
1000626898.korean: 그래, 바로 당신! 셜록 키무라를 하토모리 중의원 살인사건의 용의자로 긴급 체포하겠네!

1000626900.english: Hahaha. Sherlock, we finally caught him!

1000626901.english: Don't say anything that could be misunderstood!

1000626903.english: Let's hear the detailed story in the book!

1000626904.english: - There's no way Sherlock would do that. I know I'm not from the future.
1000626904.korean: - 셜록이 그랬을 리는 없다. 미래에서 온 것이나 다름 없는 내가 아니라고 알고 있으니까.

1000626905.english: - Still, there's no way anyone would believe this story. The police surrounded me as I struggled to come up with a solution.
1000626905.korean: - 그래도 이런 얘기를 믿어줄 리가 만무하다. 해결책을 고심하는 나를 경찰들이 둘러쌌다.

1000626906.english: Hey, you guys. You're suspects too!

1000626907.english: Wow! Tomo, this is your first time being caught!

1000626908.english: - Yeah, Tomo. This is my first time getting caught by the police...
1000626908.korean: - 그래, 토모. 나도 경찰엔 처음 잡혀 봐...

1000626909.english: - We were taken to the police station and questioned for several days as suspects in a murder case.
1000626909.korean: - 경찰서로 끌려간 우리는 살인 사건의 용의자로서 며칠 동안 조사를 받았다.

1000626910.english: - In this space, time flowed the same as outside except for the time I was sleeping, so I had the rare experience of being investigated for several days.
1000626910.korean: - 이 공간에선 내가 자는 시간을 제외하곤 시간이 밖과 동일하게 흘러갔기에, 나는 정말로 며칠 동안이나 조사를 받는 진귀한 경험을 하게 되었다.

1000626911.english: - Although my belongings were stolen, I was fortunate enough to be able to contact the outside world through Wraith. Fortunately, it seems like everything is fine outside.
1000626911.korean: - 소지품은 빼앗겼지만, 다행히 레이스를 통해 바깥과 연락할 수는 있었다. 다행히도 바깥엔 별 일 없는 모양이다.

1000626916.english: We lost again... Let's try again.

1000626917.english: - The two of them are having fun together... No, it's more like Sherlock is playing with them.
1000626917.korean: - 둘이서도 즐겁게 노는... 아니, 셜록이 놀아주는 거에 가까운가.

1000626918.english: - Even in this situation, looking at the bright Tomo, I put into words what I had been thinking.
1000626918.korean: - 이런 상황에서도 해맑은 토모를 보며 지금껏 생각했던 것을 입에 담았다.

1000626919.english: Yeah? Of course, I'm laughing because I'm happy! Ahahaha!
1000626919.korean: 응? 그거야 당연히, 행복하니까 웃는거지! 아하하핫!

1000626920.english: Didn't I tell you? That guy's been like that ever since I first met her.
1000626920.korean: 내가 말 안 했었나? 저 녀석, 발견했을 때 부터 저랬다.

1000626921.english: Was it around this time two years ago...? While returning to the office, I found this guy lying collapsed on the road.
1000626921.korean: 2년 전 이맘때 쯤이던가... 사무실로 돌아가던 중에 길바닥에 쓰러져 있는 이녀석을 발견했다.

1000626922.english: I took her to the office, but she must have hit her head pretty hard because she didn't even know where she was and just kept giggling.
1000626922.korean: 일단 사무실로 데려갔는데, 머리를 심하게 다쳤는지 자기가 어디서 왔는지도 모르고 계속 헤실헤실 웃기만 하더라고.

1000626923.english: The hospital said she was normal, but... I took her to an agency, and they said it was fine since she knew her name, so I just came back.
1000626923.korean: 병원에서는 정상이라곤 했는데, 뭐... 업체에 데려가봐도 자기 이름은 아니까 된 거 아니냐고 하길래 그냥 돌아왔지.

1000626926.english: Yeah yeah! It's so much fun!

1000626927.english: That's a relief! I have good news!
1000626927.korean: 그거 다행이군! 좋은 소식을 가지고 왔다네!

1000626928.english: It has been proven that you are innocent. Well then, goodbye!
1000626928.korean: 자네들에게 혐의가 없다는 사실이 입증되었네. 그럼, 안녕히 가시게!

1000626930.english: - Sherlock let out a deep sigh after finally being released and coming out of the police station.
1000626930.korean: - 겨우 풀려나 경찰서 밖으로 나온 뒤 셜록이 깊은 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000626931.english: Haa... I survived. If I had been caught this time, it would have been the end for me.
1000626931.korean: 하아... 살았군. 이번에 잡혀들어갔으면 진짜 끝장이었어.

1000626932.english: The culprit must have been aiming for that, too!

1000626934.english: Then let's get back to our main job.

1000626935.english: You're full of enthusiasm. Are you getting straight to the point?

1000626936.english: Right. At this point, I can't think of anything else.
1000626936.korean: 그래. 현시점에선 그것 외엔 생각할 수 없어.

1000626937.english: And when I spoke with Representative Hatomori the other day, he seemed somewhat anxious and on edge. It was as if he were being chased by someone.
1000626937.korean: 그리고 저번에 하토모리 의원과 통화할 때, 의원은 무언가 조급하고 불안한 것 같았어. 마치 누군가에게 쫓기는 것처럼.

1000626938.english: Sherlock, you didn't say that last time!
1000626938.korean: 셜록, 저번엔 그런 얘기 안 했어!

1000626939.english: Quiet down. I was distracted at the time because I was next to a corpse.
1000626939.korean: 조용히 해. 그때는 시체 옆이라 정신 없었다고.

1000626940.english: Also, I don't think Kasasagi would have lied even in a situation like that. Therefore, the current leading suspect is Representative Kirishima.
1000626940.korean: 또, 카사사기가 그런 상황에서까지 거짓말을 했다고는 생각되지 않아. 그러니 지금의 유력 용의자는 키리시마 중의원이다.

1000626941.english: Wow! Is it a congressman's house again?

1000626942.english: That won't do. We'd have to hope for a miracle just to get in touch with Representative Kirishima.
1000626942.korean: 그건 안돼. 키리시마 중의원에겐 연락이 닿는 것도 기적을 바래야 한다고.

1000626943.english: It was a miracle that we even managed to get an interview with Representative Hatomori... but well, we were cornered.
1000626943.korean: 하토모리 중의원의 인터뷰를 따낸 것도 기적이었지만... 뭐, 궁지에 몰렸었으니.

1000626944.english: Rather than that, I have a plan that I've been thinking about for the past few days. We...
1000626944.korean: 그것보다, 내가 며칠동안 생각한 작전이 있다. 우린...

1000626946.english: Huh? Mr. Kirishima, you go to school? I heard you're over 40!
1000626946.korean: 에? 키리시마 아저씨, 학교 다녀? 40살도 넘었다며!

1000626948.english: There is an elite school in Minato Ward. It is famous for being attended by members of the imperial family in the past, and even now, it is a super-elite school attended by the second-generation heirs of various conglomerates.
1000626948.korean: 미나토 구에 엘리트 학교가 있다. 과거에 황족들이 다니던 걸로 유명하고, 지금도 각종 재벌 2세들이 다니는 초 엘리트 학교지.

1000626949.english: The former chairman of that organization was none other than Representative Kirishima. Although he stepped down from the position when he entered politics, he must still have some connection to the current chairman.
1000626949.korean: 그곳의 전 이사장이 바로 키리시마 중의원이었다. 정계로 진출하며 이사장 직을 내려놓았지만, 현 이사장과도 관계가 있을 거야.

1000626950.english: And here’s a top-secret fact that only I know... The daughter of Representative Kirishima is currently attending that school. Since she took her mother’s surname, her last name isn’t Kirishima.
1000626950.korean: 그리고 이건 나만 알고 있는 특급 비밀인데... 그곳에 지금 키리시마 중의원의 딸이 다니고 있다. 어머니의 성을 따라서 성은 키리시마가 아니더군.

1000626951.english: There are two people connected to Kirishima there. Tomo and Watson, you two are going to infiltrate there to gather information.
1000626951.korean: 그곳엔 키리시마와 관련된 자가 둘이나 있다. 거기에 토모랑 왓슨, 너희 둘이 잠입해서 정보를 수집하는 거지.

1000626952.english: I was caught by the police while doing undercover reporting in the past.
1000626952.korean: 나는 예전에 잠입취재를 하다가 들켜서 경찰에 잡혔다.

1000626953.english: Ahahaha! Yeah, yeah. So Sherlock has already been to prison once!
1000626953.korean: 아하하하! 응응. 그래서 셜록은 이미 감옥 한 번 갔다왔어!

1000626954.english: I didn't go! It's a one-year suspended sentence.

1000626955.english: Well, I still have some time left on my probation, so if I get caught infiltrating, I'll be in big trouble.
1000626955.korean: 뭐, 아직 집행유예 기간이 남아서 잠입하다 걸리면 큰일나긴 하지만.

1000626959.english: The paper I found on the ceiling last time.

1000626960.english: What? No, why are you giving it to me now?
1000626960.korean: 뭐? 아니, 그걸 왜 이제야 줘!

1000626961.english: Tomo did nothing wrong. Sherlock didn't ask for it, did he?
1000626961.korean: 토모는 잘못 없어. 셜록이 달라고 안 했는 걸?

1000626962.english: Even the police station kept it well hidden!

1000626963.english: Ha... Okay. Let's read it first.

1000626964.english: Let's see... a military Bioroid contract...? Black River will supply the Ground Self-Defense Force with the T-1 Goblin strategic weapon over the next ten years...
1000626964.korean: 보자... 군사용 바이오로이드 계약서...? 블랙리버는 향후 10년간 육상자위대에 전략무기 T-1 고블린을...

1000626966.english: It's too early to make a judgment based solely on this. It could be the culprit's belongings, part of a document Representative Hatomori allegedly gave me, or it could be false information...
1000626966.korean: 이것만 가지고 판단을 내리기엔 일러. 범인의 소지품일수도, 하토모리 의원이 나에게 전해준다던 문서의 일부일수도, 거짓 정보일 수도 있지...

1000626967.english: I'll investigate this separately. In the meantime, you guys infiltrate the school.
1000626967.korean: 일단 이 건은 내가 따로 조사해보지. 그동안 너희는 학교에 잠입해줘.

1000626969.english: - I used the fake ID that Kimura made for me to become a school security guard, and Tomo, as Kimura's nephew, successfully infiltrated the school by disguising herself as a transfer student.
1000626969.korean: - 나는 키무라가 만들어준 가짜신분증을 사용해 학교 경비원, 토모는 키무라의 조카 신분으로 전학생으로 위장해 학교에 성공적으로 잠입했다.

1000626970.english: - When I arrived, the school was at lunchtime. There was no need to look for Tomo, who had sneaked in first amidst the commotion of students.
1000626970.korean: - 내가 도착했을 때 학교는 점심시간이었다. 학생들로 소란스러운 와중 먼저 잠입한 토모를 찾... 을 필요는 없겠군.

1000626971.english: Hey guys, hey guys! Me too, me too!

1000626972.english: I want to play soccer too!

1000626973.english: - ...Tomo will find clues in her own way. Yeah. That's right.

1000626974.english: - While I was unintentionally acting alone and was contemplating how to change my course of action, I saw a familiar face.
1000626974.korean: - 본의 아니게 단독행동이 되어 행동방침을 어떻게 수정할지 고민하던 도중 익숙한 얼굴이 보였다.

1000626976.english: Oh, this is the school uniform I wore to infiltrate here.
1000626976.korean: 아, 이건 이곳에 잠입하기 위해 입은 교복이라는 복장입니다.

1000626977.english: Thanks to the work of the Orca technicians, quite a few members, including myself, were able to connect.
1000626977.korean: 오르카 기술진의 작업으로 저를 포함한 꽤 많은 대원이 접속할 수 있었습니다.

1000626978.english: But... Your Majesty, don't you wear this uniform?
1000626978.korean: 그런데 그... 각하께선 이 교복을 입지 않으십니까?

1000626981.english: Private conversations with security guards are worth 5 penalty points.

1000626982.english: Hehe, I expected Your Majesty to make that kind of expression.
1000626982.korean: 후훗, 각하께서 그런 표정을 하실 거라고 예상했습니다.

1000626983.english: - If Armand has logged in too... maybe she could use her precognitive abilities to solve the case?
1000626983.korean: - 아르망까지 접속했다면... 혹시 예지 능력으로 사건을 해결할 수 있지 않을까?

1000626984.english: I apologize, Your Majesty. There is insufficient data on this time period and event to make a perfect prediction.
1000626984.korean: 죄송합니다, 폐하. 아직 이 시간대와 사건에 대한 데이터가 부족해 완벽한 예측이 불가능합니다.

1000626985.english: One piece of advice though... you'd better watch out for security robots.
1000626985.korean: 그래도 한 가지 조언을 드리자면... 경비 로봇들을 조심하시는 게 좋을 거예요.

1000626987.english: - I can hear Tomo calling me from the playground. With more and more students starting to look our way, I’d better stop her before it gets out of hand.
1000626987.korean: - 운동장에서 토모가 나를 부르는 소리가 들린다. 점점 학생들의 이목이 집중되니 어서 말려야겠군.

1000626989.english: We will look for clues on our own. We have already been informed of the entire situation so far by the Doctor.
1000626989.korean: 저희는 저희대로 단서를 찾아보겠습니다. 지금까지의 상황은 닥터에게 전부 전달받았으니까요.

1000626990.english: Don't forget your role as a disguised persona, either. I'm also trying hard not to get caught.
1000626990.korean: 위장 신분으로서의 역할도 잊지 마세요. 저도 들키지 않기 위해 애쓰고 있으니까요.

1000626991.english: Considering that... doesn't it look a little fun?
1000626991.korean: 그런 것 치곤... 조금 즐거워 보이지 않나?

1000626992.english: Hehe, unlike the people at Orca, the people here listen well when I point things out, so I found myself getting excited without even realizing it.
1000626992.korean: 후후, 이곳 분들은 오르카 분들과는 다르게 지적하면 말을 잘 들어주셔서 저도 모르게 신이 났네요.

1000626993.english: Oh my, Your Majesty has stepped forward, so that cannot be.

1000626994.english: That is correct, Your Excellency. We have come merely to lighten your burden. We are not considering failure.
1000626994.korean: 그렇습니다, 각하. 저희가 온 것은 각하의 수고를 덜어드리기 위함일 뿐. 실패는 생각하고 있지 않습니다.

1000626996.english: I just mentioned that, but... if you don't stop that Tomo model within one minute, it seems highly likely to fail.
1000626996.korean: 방금 그런 말씀을 드린 참입니다만... 1분 내로 저 토모 모델을 말리지 않으면 실패할 가능성이 높을 것으로 보입니다.

1000626997.english: Ah, Your Excellency. The connected members are-

1000626999.english: Then we shall go as well. We must assist His Majesty. We also have leadership activities to carry out.
1000626999.korean: 그럼 저희도 가보죠. 폐하를 도와드려야 합니다. 선도 활동도 해야하구요.

1000627000.english: ...Aren't you enjoying this a bit too much?

1000627001.english: After all, I was originally created for the purpose of acting. And...
1000627001.korean: 원래 저는 연기를 목적으로 만들어졌으니까요. 그리고...

1000627002.english: It is nice to see Your Majesty looking different from usual.
1000627002.korean: 평소와 다른 폐하의 모습을 보는 것도 좋네요.

1000627004.english: I have no choice but to agree with that.

1000627006.english: - hurriedly ran out of the school and rushed to Tomo. Upon spotting me, Tomo ran towards me even faster than I did.
1000627006.korean: - 황급히 교사 밖으로 나가 토모에게 달려갔다. 나를 발견한 토모는 나보다 더 빠르게 내게 달려왔다.

1000627007.english: Watson, Watson! I found out a HUGE fact!
1000627007.korean: 왓슨, 왓슨! 내가 엄~청난 사실을 알아냈어!

1000627008.english: Yeah, yeah. I asked the friends I used to play soccer with about Kirishima, you know? Well, guess what!
1000627008.korean: 응응. 같이 축구를 하던 친구들한테 키리시마 중의원에 대해 물어봤거든? 그러니까 글쎄!

1000627009.english: I heard that Representative Kirishima's daughter attends this school!
1000627009.korean: 이 학교에 키리시마 중의원의 딸이 다니고 있대!

1000627010.english: - Did Sherlock commit a terrible sin in a past life...?
1000627010.korean: - 셜록은 전생에 끔찍한 죄라도 저지른 걸까...?

1000627011.english: And there's more! I heard the student council president of this school is close with the chairman of the board!
1000627011.korean: 그리고 또 있어! 이 학교 학생회장이 이사장이랑 친하대!

1000627012.english: So, I have an idea! I think we should investigate the student council president! What do you think, Watson? Huh?
1000627012.korean: 그래서 내 생각은 있지! 학생회장을 조사해 보면 될 것 같아! 왓슨 생각은 어때? 응?

1000627013.english: - Student council president... I suppose that is a position representing the students. It would certainly be more efficient than simply going around stirring things up.
1000627013.korean: - 학생회장이라… 학생들을 대표하는 위치겠지. 단순히 들쑤시고 다니는 것보단 확실히 효율적이겠군.

1000627014.english: Yeah! That building over there is the student council president's office!

1000627015.english: - While crossing the sports field toward the building Tomo had pointed to, a security robot suddenly appeared and blocked their path.
1000627015.korean: - 운동장을 가로질러 토모가 가리킨 건물로 향하던 중, 갑자기 나타난 경비로봇이 앞을 가로막았다.

1000627016.english: Unidentified intruder spotted. Identity cannot be verified. Please present identification.
1000627016.korean: 신원 미확인 거수자 발견. 신원이 확인되지 않습니다. 신분증을 제시해 주십시오.

1000627017.english: - I heard from Sherlock that this fake ID might be able to fool people, but it wouldn't stand a chance against the AGS...
1000627017.korean: - 셜록에게 이 가짜 신분증은 사람은 속일 수 있어도 AGS한테는 어림도 없다고 들었었는데...

1000627018.english: - They climbed over the wall again because of that, and in the end, this is what happened.
1000627018.korean: - 그것 때문에 이번에도 담을 넘어 들어왔는데 결국 이런 사태가 발생했군.

1000627019.english: - I'm used to situations like this by now. The solution is simple.
1000627019.korean: - 이런 상황도 이제 익숙하다. 해결책이야 간단하지.

1000627022.english: - I had no choice but to run holding Tomo's hand again this time.
1000627022.korean: - 나는 이번에도 토모의 손을 붙잡고 달릴 수밖에 없었다.

1000627023.english: If you follow along obediently, there will be no bloodshed.
1000627023.korean: 순순히 따라오시면 유혈 사태는 일어나지 않습니다.

1000627024.english: - Tomo and I fought hard in our own ways, but it was not enough to escape from the AGS guards.
1000627024.korean: - 토모와 나는 나름대로 분전했지만, 경비 AGS에게서 벗어나는 것은 역부족이었다.

1000627025.english: - I never would have guessed that Sherlock’s remark about not being able to get out once you go in was a foreshadowing...
1000627025.korean: - 이번에 들어가면 못 나온다는 셜록의 말이 복선이었을 줄이야...

1000627026.english: Wait. Please stop. Those people are guests invited to the student council.
1000627026.korean: 잠깐. 멈추세요. 그 사람들은 학생회에 초청된 손님분들입니다.

1000627027.english: Checking the guest list reveals no relevant items. We will proceed with the arrest order.
1000627027.korean: 손님 명단 확인 결과 해당 사항 없습니다. 체포 명령을 계속 수행합니다.

1000627028.english: Oh my, I must have forgotten to leave that out.

1000627029.english: I will use my authority as Student Council President to request the withdrawal of the Security AGS from performing their duties. That was Article 3, Paragraph 11 of the school regulations, wasn't it?
1000627029.korean: 학생회장 권한으로 경비 AGS의 임무 수행 철회를 요구하겠습니다. 교칙 3조 11항이었죠, 아마?

1000627031.english: I hope you have a pleasant time.

1000627032.english: - It was only after the security guard AGS left that I could breathe a sigh of relief.
1000627032.korean: - 경비 AGS가 떠나가고 나서야 나는 안도의 한숨을 내쉴 수 있었다.

1000627033.english: Oh my, it looks like you know me?

1000627034.english: Then... may I ask what brings you to school?
1000627034.korean: 그럼... 무슨 일로 학교에 오셨는지 여쭤봐도 될까요?

1000627035.english: - Oh... is this Shirayuri from over here?

1000627036.korean: 우린 키리시마 중의원에 대해서 조사하고 있어!

1000627038.english: ...You heard me say a little while ago that I am the student council president of this school, right?
1000627038.korean: ...조금 전에, 제가 이 학교 학생회장이라고 한 거, 들으셨죠?

1000627042.english: - We ended up explaining the whole situation to Shirayuri in the student council president's office.
1000627042.korean: - 우린 학생회장실에서 시라유리에게 자초지종을 설명하게 되었다.

1000627043.english: - Not knowing what the other person was up to, he spent about ten minutes explaining things, choosing his words carefully. Shirayuri nodded lightly.
1000627043.korean: - 상대가 어떤 꿍꿍이를 가지고 있는지 모르니 신중하게 말을 고르며 설명하길 십여 분. 시라유리는 가볍게 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000627044.english: I see. Reporters from the BHK Shimbun...

1000627045.english: Seeing as you went out of your way to find me, it looks like your undercover reporting didn't go well.
1000627045.korean: 굳이 저를 찾아오시려고 한 걸 보니, 잠입 취재는 잘 안 되셨나 보네요?

1000627046.english: It might sound a bit pathetic, but you've come to the right place. I'm actually very interested in the information you're looking for.
1000627046.korean: 조금 한심하긴 하지만, 잘 찾아오셨어요. 저도 당신들이 찾는 정보에 대해 관심이 많거든요.

1000627047.english: Bio-roids occasionally visit the chairman's office, and I've also heard that lately there have been many instances of encountering strange guests.
1000627047.korean: 이사장실에 가끔 바이오로이드들이 오기도 했는데다, 요새는 이상한 손님들과 만나는 경우가 많다는 얘기도 들렸어요.

1000627048.english: So, feeling a bit concerned, I investigated personally... and found out that there is something going on between the current chairman and the former chairman.
1000627048.korean: 그래서 조금 신경쓰여서 개인적으로 조사해본 결과... 현 이사장님과 전 이사장님간에 무언가 있다는 것을 알아냈죠.

1000627049.english: - Knowing that Shirayuri is an intelligence bioroid belonging to Agency 080, I could roughly understand. She is probably infiltrating the school under orders from her current owner to dig up things that could serve as political weaknesses.
1000627049.korean: - 시라유리가 080기관 소속의 첩보 바이오로이드라는 것을 아는 나는 대충 이해할 수 있었다. 아마 지금의 주인에게 명령받아 학교에 잠입하고, 정치적인 약점이 될 수 있는 것들을 캐내고 있겠지.

1000627050.english: Hehe. Do you know what give and take is?

1000627052.english: Yes, well done. If I am to give you something, you will have to give me something in return, right?
1000627052.korean: 네, 잘했어요. 제가 드리려면, 그쪽에서도 뭔가를 주셔야겠죠?

1000627053.english: If you give me something that matches this information, I will give you something in return.
1000627053.korean: 이 정보에 걸맞는 것을 제게 주신다면, 저도 드리도록 하죠.

1000627054.english: - It is a tempting offer, but we have no cards to play. In that case...
1000627054.korean: - 솔깃한 제안이지만 우리에겐 제시할만한 카드가 없다. 그렇다면...

1000627055.english: - At my words, Shirayuri narrowed her eyes.
1000627055.korean: - 내 말에 시라유리는 눈을 가늘게 떴다.

1000627056.english: I can't tell if you're simply clumsy or bold.
1000627056.korean: 단순히 서툰건지, 대범한건지 분간이 안되는 분이시네요.

1000627057.english: Was being caught by the AGS security team also an intentional act?
1000627057.korean: 혹시 경비 AGS에 붙잡힌 것도 의도된 행동이었나요?

1000627058.english: - Good, that worked. As I shrugged my shoulders without a word, Shirayuri smirked.
1000627058.korean: - 좋아, 먹혔다. 내가 말없이 어깨를 으쓱하자 시라유리는 피식 웃었다.

1000627059.english: Well, fine. I'll fall for it.

1000627060.english: I'm not looking for anything extraordinary, even if it's information.
1000627060.korean: 정보라고 해도 대단한 것을 원하는 건 아니에요.

1000627061.english: What I want is information about this school's students. Even at this very moment, countless pieces of information are circulating within the school.
1000627061.korean: 제가 원하는 것은 이 학교 학생들의 정보. 지금 이순간에도 수많은 정보가 교내에서 흘러다니고 있어요.

1000627062.english: You know that this school is a place where talented people from all over the country gather, right? In other words, it means that the children of the elites currently leading the country, as well as the elites who will lead it in the future, are all gathered here.
1000627062.korean: 이 학교가 각지의 인재가 모이는 곳이란 것 정도는 알고 있죠? 다시말해, 현재 나라를 이끌어가는 엘리트들의 자녀와 미래에 나라를 이끌어갈 엘리트들이 전부 모인다는 뜻이에요.

1000627063.english: It is their secret. Illicit relationships, unrequited love, unspeakable hobbies... anything is fine. If you tell me the secrets of students they want to hide from others, I will give you what you want.
1000627063.korean: 바로 그들의 비밀. 불온한 관계, 짝사랑, 말 못할 취미... 뭐든 좋아요. 다른 사람에게 숨기고 싶어할 학생들의 비밀을 저에게 알려주신다면, 원하는 것을 넘겨드리죠.

1000627064.english: What do you think? I think it's a pretty attractive deal.
1000627064.korean: 어떠신가요? 꽤 매력적인 거래 조건이라고 생각하는데요.

1000627065.english: Heh heh. You shouldn't ignore gossip. No matter how fast someone is on the road to success, a single small blemish can bring them down in an instant.
1000627065.korean: 후훗. 가쉽을 무시해선 안 돼요. 아무리 인생의 성공대로를 달리던 사람이라도, 작은 오점 하나로 순식간에 무너질 수 있죠.

1000627066.english: And well... it's also my preference.

1000627067.english: Oh my, you knew that? Are you perhaps much more amazing than I thought?
1000627067.korean: 어머, 그것까지 알고 계셨나요? 혹시 제 생각보다 엄청 대단하신 분?

1000627068.english: - It’s a very favorable condition for us, but... we’ll have no choice but to accept it.
1000627068.korean: - 우리에게 너무 유리한 조건이지만... 수락할 수밖에 없겠지.

1000627069.english: I don't mind, so please take your time.

1000627070.english: Ah, could you please try not to get caught by the AGS security guards? I can't follow them around every single time.
1000627070.korean: 아, 경비 AGS에게는 가급적 들키지 않도록 해주시겠어요? 제가 일일히 따라다닐 수는 없으니까요.

1000627071.english: Hehe, I'm talking way too much, which isn't like me. I wonder if it's because I like you so much?
1000627071.korean: 후후, 저답지 않게 너무 말이 많네요. 그쪽이 너무 마음에 들어서 그랬으려나요?

1000627072.english: Enough to want to meet again.

1000627073.english: Watson! I want to go to the playground!

1000627077.english: - As soon as she stepped out of the student council president's office, Tomo ran straight to the playground.

1000627078.english: - What should I do? Since Tomo left, I guess I should go to the sports field one last time.
1000627078.korean: - 나는 어떻게 할까? 토모가 갔으니까 운동장은 마지막으로 가보는게 좋겠지.

1000627079.english: - The information I checked before infiltrating said there was a shelter set up on the school rooftop.
1000627079.korean: - 잠입하기 전 확인한 정보에선 학교 옥상에 쉼터가 조성되어 있다고 했었지.

1000627081.english: - As I went up to the rooftop, I saw groups of students here and there. I decided to go over to the loudest group.
1000627081.korean: - 옥상에 올라오자 이곳저곳에 학생 무리들이 보였다. 그중 가장 시끄러운 무리 쪽으로 가보기로 했다.

1000627082.english: Hmph, you're ridiculously weak! It's a million years too early for you to challenge me!
1000627082.korean: 헹, 턱없이 약하구만! 나에게 덤비기엔 백만 년은 이르다고!

1000627083.english: - Bavaria stood before the numerous students lying face down on the floor, curled up like pillbugs.
1000627083.korean: - 바닥에 콩벌레처럼 몸을 둥글게 말고 엎드려 있는 수많은 학생들 앞에, 바바리아나가 있었다.

1000627084.english: - Just a moment ago, while I was debating how to strike up a conversation because of Shirayuri, Bavariana blatantly gestured to me.
1000627084.korean: - 조금 전 시라유리때문에 어떻게 말을 걸어야 할지 고민하는 사이, 바바리아나는 대놓고 내게 손짓했다.

1000627085.english: Oh, Commander—no, wait. Security Guard! I was just looking for you.
1000627085.korean: 오오, 사령- 아니지. 경비 아저씨! 마침 찾고 있었다고.

1000627086.english: Hahaha, don't worry. These guys are losers. Losers have no right to listen, nor the right to speak.
1000627086.korean: 하하핫, 걱정 마. 이녀석들은 패배자니까. 패배자에겐 들을 자격도, 말할 자격도 없지.

1000627088.english: - At Barbariana's question, the pillbugs squirm and make a mumbling sound...
1000627088.korean: - 바바리아나의 물음에 콩벌레들이 꿈틀거리며 웅얼거리는 소리를 낸다...

1000627089.english: Huh? No, no, of course I didn't use violence.
1000627089.korean: 응? 아냐아냐, 당연히 폭력을 쓰진 않았다고.

1000627090.english: He challenged me, so I just beat him. By arm wrestling, I mean.

1000627091.english: But well... I can use violence even without the Commander's orders.
1000627091.korean: 근데 뭐... 사령- 아저씨의 명령이 없어도 폭력을 쓸 수 있긴 해.

1000627092.english: This isn't reality to begin with, is it? And we didn't even connect through a normal route.
1000627092.korean: 여긴 애초에 현실이 아니잖아? 그리고 우리가 접속한 것도 정상적인 루트는 아니고.

1000627093.english: - Barbariana whispered in my ear, as if realizing that even so, talking about this was dangerous.
1000627093.korean: - 아무리 그래도 이런 얘기는 위험하단 것을 깨달았는지 바바리아나가 귓속말로 소근거렸다.

1000627094.english: Maybe that's why there aren't really any restrictions on my actions. Well, that doesn't mean I intend to go around causing harm indiscriminately, though.
1000627094.korean: 그래서 그런지 딱히 행동에 제약은 없어. 뭐, 그렇다고 아무렇게나 해코지를 하고 다닐 생각은 없지만.

1000627096.english: Still, you know. Shouldn't we teach those guys who underestimate me just because I'm a woman a lesson?
1000627096.korean: 그래도 말야. 여자라고 얕봐서 도전해오는 녀석들에겐 따끔한 맛을 보여줘야되지 않겠어?

1000627097.english: - Barbariana, who had been pretending not to notice my remark, suddenly scratched her head as if something had just occurred to her.
1000627097.korean: - 내 태클에 딴청을 부리던 바바리아나가 문득 생각난듯이 머리를 긁적였다.

1000627098.english: Ah, sorry. Because of these guys, I still haven't been able to find anything about Kirishima.
1000627098.korean: 아, 미안. 이 녀석들 때문에 키리시마에 대한 건 아직 못찾았어.

1000627099.english: - When I explained what had happened with Shirayuri, Bavariana nodded.
1000627099.korean: - 시라유리와 있었던 일을 설명해주자, 바바리아나는 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000627100.english: That makes sense when you think about Orca's Shirayuri.
1000627100.korean: 오르카의 시라유리를 생각해보면 그럴 법 하네.

1000627101.english: But as for the students' secrets... I haven't really gotten close to many of them yet, so I don't know.
1000627101.korean: 그런데 학생들의 비밀이라... 아직 친해진 애가 별로 없어서 잘 모르겠는데.

1000627102.english: Oh, right! There's a girl named Anzu, and I heard she likes a boy named Setouchi.
1000627102.korean: 아, 그래! 안즈라는 여자애가 있는데, 걔가 세토우치라는 남자애를 좋아한다더라구.

1000627104.english: Um... there's this blonde, tanned girl named Anzu I've become close with, and she says she's been attracted to this guy named Setouchi lately, who is... that otaku?
1000627104.korean: 음... 친해진 애중에 안즈라고 금발에 태닝한 여자애가 있는데, 걔가 그... 오타쿠? 그거인 세토우치란 애한테 요새 끌린대.

1000627105.english: I think she said something like she liked the innocence she couldn't find in other guys... or something like that.
1000627105.korean: 다른 남자한테선 볼 수 없는 순수한 점이 좋다던가... 뭐 그랬던 것 같아.

1000627106.english: Hahaha, as expected, this kind of cheesy story is a bit embarrassing.
1000627106.korean: 하하핫, 역시 이런 간질거리는 이야기는 좀 부끄러운데.

1000627111.english: - Now I guess I need to decide on the next destination...

1000627112.english: - I think there was a swimming pool behind the building. I should go check it out.
1000627112.korean: - 건물 뒤에 수영장이 있었던 것 같다. 거기로 한 번 가봐야겠군.

1000627114.english: - Behind the school, there was nothing but a swimming pool; there were no students. Just as I was about to turn around, I saw familiar green hair.
1000627114.korean: - 교사 뒷편엔 수영장이 있을뿐, 학생들은 없었다. 발걸음을 돌리려는데 익숙한 녹색 머리카락이 보였다.

1000627116.english: Haha, you're the Commander through and through! Linti is just bursting with cuteness right now! She's in top form, after all!
1000627116.korean: 꺄하핫, 역시 사령관이에요! 지금의 린티는 귀여움 성분 가득! 최고의 컨디션이니까요!

1000627117.english: Hehehe, you were actually looking for Linty, right? Right? You're too embarrassed to say it, right?
1000627117.korean: 에헤헷, 사실 린티를 찾고 계셨던 거죠? 그렇죠? 부끄러워서 말 못하시는 거죠?

1000627118.english: Chaam~ You've fallen for Linty's cuteness so much~

1000627119.english: Here's a special treat! Let's enjoy Linty's adorableness in this adorable school uniform!
1000627119.korean: 자, 특별 서비스에요! 이 귀~여운 교복을 입은 린티의 귀여움을 만끽하도록 해드릴게요!

1000627120.english: - Linti twirled around, holding onto her school skirt, and went all out to show off how cute she was.
1000627120.korean: - 린티는 교복치마를 잡고 한바퀴 빙글 돌며 자신의 귀여움을 마구 어필했다.

1000627122.english: Yeah, yeah, yeah, I guess so. Lee, Linty is super cute. Hehe...
1000627122.korean: 그그그그렇겠죠오. 리, 린티는 엄~청 귀여우니까요. 헤헷...

1000627124.english: Hey, stop! Linty, this is going to be a real problem, so please stop...!
1000627124.korean: 그, 그만! 린티 진짜 큰일날 것 같으니까 그만해주세요...!

1000627125.english: Ugh... why only at times like this...

1000627126.english: - To help cool Linti’s flushed face, I decided to tell her what had happened with Shirayuri.
1000627126.korean: - 새빨갛게 물든 린티의 얼굴을 좀 식혀줄 겸, 시라유리와 있었던 일을 전달해주기로 했다.

1000627127.english: Hahaha, you're changing the subject because you're embarrassed, right? Right?
1000627127.korean: 꺄하핫, 부끄러워서 말을 돌리시는 거죠? 그렇죠?

1000627130.english: So, Commander, you need information about the students here now?
1000627130.korean: 그러면 사령관님은 지금 여기 학생들에 대한 정보가 필요하시다는 거죠?

1000627131.english: Uh-huh, I know something Linty might be able to help with. I saw that girl confessing earlier.
1000627131.korean: 우후후, 린티가 도움이 될만한 걸 알고 있어요. 아까 어떤 여자애가 고백하던 걸 봤거든요.

1000627132.english: Her name is Siho, and I heard she’s quite popular because she’s pretty cute, though not quite as much as Linti.
1000627132.korean: 시호라고 하는데, 린티 만큼은 아니지만 꽤 귀여워서 인기가 많은 애라고 하더라구요.

1000627133.english: Setouchi... was it? I confessed to a bespectacled boy with that name, but well!
1000627133.korean: 세토우치... 였나? 그런 이름의 안경 쓴 남자애한테 고백했는데요, 글쎄!

1000627134.english: I was rejected because I already had another crush!
1000627134.korean: 이미 다른 좋아하는 애가 있다고 거절당하더라구요!

1000627135.english: I think her name was... Anzu.

1000627136.english: How was it, Linty? Was it helpful?

1000627138.english: Then Linty, I'll look into other things too. Is that okay?
1000627138.korean: 그럼 린티는 다른 것도 더 알아보고 있을게요. 그래도 되죠?

1000627140.english: - Linty disappeared in an instant, her twin tails fluttering.

1000627143.english: - I guess I should take a look around the playground where the students are gathered.

1000627145.english: - I found Marie talking with other students with a serious expression in the corner of the playground.
1000627145.korean: - 운동장 구석에서 다른 학생들과 심각한 얼굴로 대화를 나누고 있던 마리를 발견했다.

1000627147.english: Sorry. I'll tell you the rest later.

1000627149.english: Let's talk about the beauty of waking men next time. I promise!
1000627149.korean: 다음에 또 깨어나는 남성의 아름다움에 대해 이야기하자. 약속이야!

1000627150.english: - ...Wouldn't just the conversation between Marie and those students be enough information for Shirayuri?
1000627150.korean: - ...이거, 마리랑 저 학생들이 나눈 이야기만 해도 시라유리에겐 충분한 정보가 되지 않을까?

1000627151.english: I apologize, Your Majesty. Due to unavoidable circumstances, I haven't yet been able to find out anything about Representative Kirishima.
1000627151.korean: 죄송합니다, 각하. 그... 피치 못할 사정이 있어서 키리시마 중의원에 대한 것은 아직 알아내지 못했습니다.

1000627152.english: - When I told her about what happened with Shirayuri, Marie nodded.
1000627152.korean: - 시라유리와의 일은 말해주자 마리는 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000627153.english: I see. It's a secret from the other students...

1000627154.english: I'm not sure if this is appropriate, but I heard something from a student named Shiho. Oh, she was one of the students who was here a moment ago.
1000627154.korean: 적절한 것일지는 모르겠지만, 시호라는 여학생에게 들은 게 있습니다. 아, 조금 전 있던 학생들 중 한 명입니다.

1000627155.english: Although Shiho appears to be a top student in front of others, she is actually deeply into anime.
1000627155.korean: 시호 양은 남들 앞에선 우등생이지만, 사실 애니메이션에 심취해 있다고 합니다.

1000627156.english: I heard that lately she’s been talking about anime with a boy named Setouchi from her class on their way to and from school.
1000627156.korean: 요즘 들어 같은 반 세토우치라는 남학생과 등하굣길에 애니메이션에 대해 이야기를 나눈다고 하더군요.

1000627157.english: As we became closer, I received counseling that the boy had entered my heart.
1000627157.korean: 그러면서 친해지고... 어느새 자신의 마음 속에 그 남학생이 들어와 있었다, 라는 상담을 받았습니다.

1000627158.english: As for relationships between men and women... well, I’ve only had experience with one person—His Excellency—but I gave her some advice anyway. She said she’s going to confess her feelings in a letter soon.
1000627158.korean: 저도 남녀관계에 대해선... 그, 각하 한 분 뿐이지만 경험은 있으니 적당히 조언해주었습니다. 곧 편지로 고백을 한다고 하더군요.

1000627159.english: That's all I've heard. If that's not enough, please tell me more...
1000627159.korean: 제가 들은 것은 이정도입니다. 혹시 부족하다면 더...

1000627160.english: I am glad that it was helpful to you, Your Majesty.

1000627161.english: Then I'll look for something else.

1000627162.english: - Marie started to salute, but after glancing around, she awkwardly bowed her head and disappeared.
1000627162.korean: - 마리는 경례를 하려다 주변을 살펴보곤 어색하게 꾸벅 고개를 숙인 뒤 사라졌다.

1000627163.english: - I think I've gotten enough information.

1000627164.english: - I guess I should go back to Shirayuri now.

1000627168.english: Miss Otana. Running in the hallway is a two-point penalty.
1000627168.korean: 오타나 양. 복도에서 뛰는 행동은 벌점 2점입니다.

1000627169.english: Sorry, sorry. It's urgent, so please excuse me just this once.
1000627169.korean: 미안미안. 급한 일이니까 한 번만 봐줘.

1000627170.english: You know, there's a naked woman wandering around near the school wearing only a coat!
1000627170.korean: 있잖아, 학교 근처에서 알몸에 코트만 입은 여자가 배회하고 있어!

1000627172.english: That's a problem. I'll go and see.

1000627173.english: Oh, alone? You're obviously a pervert, so what could happen to you-
1000627173.korean: 호, 혼자서? 변태인 게 분명한데, 무슨 일을 당할수도-

1000627176.english: Ugh, it's nothing. I just suddenly feel a bit nauseous.
1000627176.korean: 으으, 아무것도 아냐. 그냥 갑자기 속이 좀 안좋네.

1000627177.english: That pervert is more important than that! I'll go with you.
1000627177.korean: 그것보다 그 변태가 우선이야! 나라도 같이 가줄게.

1000627179.english: I'll go with you, I'll go with you, I'll go with you, I'll go with you, I'll go with you, I'll go with you, I'll go with you, I'll go with you, I'll go with you, I'll go with you
1000627179.korean: 나라도 같이 가줄게나라도 같이 가줄게나라도 같이 가줄게나라도 같이 가줄게나라도 같이 가줄게나라도 같이 가줄게나라도 같이 가줄게나라도 같이 가줄게나라도 같이 가줄게나라

1000627182.english: To think the noise coming from my body... is turning into an Iron Bug...!

1000627183.english: It looks like they've dealt with all the ones that popped out.
1000627183.korean: 일단 튀어나온 녀석들은 다 처리한것 같은데?

1000627184.english: It seems like the people around can't see it. We fought like this, but there's hardly any reaction.
1000627184.korean: 주변 사람들한텐 안보이나 본데요? 이렇게나 싸웠는데 별 반응이 없어요.

1000627185.english: Communication with Your Excellency is not established.

1000627186.english: Fortunately, Miss Race is by His Majesty's side.
1000627186.korean: 다행히도 레이스 양이 폐하의 곁에 있어요.

1000627187.english: Still, let’s secure His Majesty’s safety before it’s too late.
1000627187.korean: 그래도 늦기 전에 폐하의 신변을 확보하죠.

1000627190.english: - Shirayuri listened to the information I gave her and jotted it down in her notebook.
1000627190.korean: - 시라유리는 내가 전해준 정보를 들으며 수첩에 받아적었다.

1000627191.english: It's not bad. This should be enough.

1000627193.english: Yeah! Now it's our turn to take!

1000627195.english: few weeks ago, I overheard a phone conversation between the current chairman and Assemblyman Kirishima.
1000627195.korean: 몇 주 전에, 현 이사장님과 키리시마 의원님의 통화를 들었어요.

1000627196.english: It was about meeting with other council members at a bar, while being entertained by bioroids.
1000627196.korean: 어떤 술집에서 다른 의원님들과 모이자는 내용이었죠. 바이오로이드들에게 접대를 받으면서요.

1000627197.english: To the bioroids supported by the Densetsu executives.

1000627198.english: I don't know exactly which bar it is, but it is clear that Assemblyman Kirishima, the Chairman, and even the Densetsu executives are involved. Here is the recording.
1000627198.korean: 정확히 어떤 술집인지는 모르겠지만, 키리시마 중의원님과 이사장님, 거기에 덴세츠 간부들까지 엮여있는 건 분명하겠죠. 여기, 녹음파일이에요.

1000627199.english: I just gave back as much as I received.

1000627200.english: Then let's part ways here. You'd better hurry if you want to find a clue.
1000627200.korean: 그럼 여기서 헤어지도록 해요. 단서를 잡으시려면 서두르는 게 좋을테니까요.

1000627201.english: Ah, please exit through the back door when you leave.

1000627202.english: Right now... it is the time when the security AGS is on patrol.
1000627202.korean: 지금은... 경비 AGS가 순찰을 도는 시간이거든요.

1000627203.english: You did a great job! I believed in you!

1000627204.english: - When I returned to the office and handed over the USB I received from Shirayuri, Sherlock excitedly patted my shoulder.
1000627204.korean: - 사무실로 돌아와 시라유리에게 받은 USB를 건네주자 셜록은 신나게 내 어깨를 두드렸다.

1000627205.english: It's a huge hit! The day is not far off when every media outlet is talking about our articles!
1000627205.korean: 아주 대박이야! 모든 매체가 우리의 기사 얘기를 하는 날이 머지 않았어!

1000627206.english: This USB alone is just a mid-range hit... but look at this.
1000627206.korean: 이 USB만 가지고서는 중박 정도지만... 자, 이걸 보라고.

1000627207.english: This is the contract that you said you would investigate while you were at school.
1000627207.korean: 너희가 학교에 가있는 동안 조사한다고 했던 계약서다.

1000627208.english: It looks like an ordinary contract on the surface... well, I mean, that alone would probably make it a state secret.
1000627208.korean: 겉으로 보기엔 평범한 계약서로 보이지... 아니 뭐, 이것만으로도 국가 기밀사항이겠지만.

1000627209.english: Anyway, at first I thought it was a contract between Black River and the Japan Ground Self-Defense Forces, but after looking into it, it doesn't seem to be the case.
1000627209.korean: 어쨌든, 처음엔 블랙리버와 육상자위대 간의 계약서인 줄 알았는데 알아보니 아닌 것 같다.

1000627210.english: Watson, as you know, the import of bioroids in this country is currently extremely restricted for national security reasons. That is also the reason why Densetsu was able to grow significantly through its domestic business.
1000627210.korean: 왓슨 너도 알듯이, 지금 이 나라는 국가 안보를 이유로 바이오로이드 수입이 극히 제한되어 있다. 덴세츠가 내수사업으로 크게 성장할 수 있었던 이유이기도 하지.

1000627211.english: In other words, this contract is a contract to sell Black River's bioroids from Densetsu to the Japan Ground Self-Defense Force.
1000627211.korean: 즉, 이 계약서는 덴세츠에서 블랙리버의 바이오로이드를 육상자위대에 판다는 계약서.

1000627212.english: What Representative Hatomori was trying to tell us was probably the relationship between Densetsu and the government.
1000627212.korean: 하토모리 중의원이 우리에게 알려주려 했던 건 아마 덴세츠와 정부간의 관계였을거다.

1000627214.english: Uh-huh, no. Hehe, I was about to think of something but stopped.
1000627214.korean: 으응, 아냐. 에헤헷, 뭔가 생각나려다 말았어.

1000627215.english: This coverage smells like a jackpot. The scent of a thick conspiracy...! If done right...!
1000627215.korean: 이번 취재는 대박의 냄새가 난다. 짙은 음모의 냄새가...! 잘만 하면...!

1000627216.english: Eek... Kimura, you look creepy. You're like a total mean old man.
1000627216.korean: 에엑... 키무라, 기분 나빠. 완전 나쁜 아저씨같아.

1000627217.english: I'm not old enough to be called 'Mister' yet.

1000627218.english: Watson, do you remember? Back when Saman Industries released the Labiata prototype, newspapers sold like hotcakes.
1000627218.korean: 왓슨, 기억나나? 예전에 삼안산업에서 라비아타 프로토타입이 출시되었을 때, 신문이 불티나게 팔렸었지.

1000627219.english: It was the first time in my life I had seen newspapers sold like that.
1000627219.korean: 난 신문이 그렇게 팔리는 건 태어나서 처음 봤었다.

1000627220.english: But... do you know the reason? It was very simple.
1000627220.korean: 그런데... 그 이유가 뭔지 아나? 아주 간단했다.

1000627221.english: Newspaper reporters got a photo of Labiata before the internet did. Our article is going to be the same soon, Watson!
1000627221.korean: 인터넷보다 신문 기자들이 먼저 라비아타의 사진을 얻었었거든. 우리의 이번 기사도 곧 그렇게 될 거다, 왓슨!

1000627222.english: Hahaha, this is so much fun!

1000627223.english: Ahem, alright. Let me calm down first. It's not over yet.
1000627223.korean: 흠흠, 좋아. 일단 마음을 좀 가라앉히지. 아직 끝난 게 아니니까.

1000627224.english: First of all, the important thing is where the bar is the secret rendezvous spot.
1000627224.korean: 우선 중요한 건, 밀회장소인 술집이 어디냐는 거야.

1000627225.english: This is a map showing all the nearby bars—
1000627225.korean: 이건 근처 술집을 모두 표시한 지도인데-

1000627226.english: You know what? I heard it from Sachiko Tomo. She said her dad is going to a bar.
1000627226.korean: 있지. 토모 사치코한테서 들었어. 자기 아빠가 술집에 간대.

1000627229.english: Tomodo, you weren't just goofing off, were you? It was all for the story!
1000627229.korean: 토모도 놀고 있었던 건 아닌데? 다 취재를 위한 거였다구!

1000627230.english: Hehe. My friend, Sachiko Kirishima, told me. She said she heard her dad goes to a bar in Roppongi.
1000627230.korean: 에헤헷. 내 친구, 키리시마 사치코가 말해줬어. 자기 아빠가 롯폰기에 있는 술집에 간다는 걸 들었대.

1000627231.english: I'm sorry to my daughter, but... that's a valuable clue.

1000627232.english: You did a great job, Tomo. You know where it is, right?

1000627234.english: Okay. Then let's go cover the story.

1000627237.english: - When we arrived at Roppongi by car with Tomo's guidance, it was already night.
1000627237.korean: - 차를 몰고 토모의 안내를 받아 롯폰기에 도착하자 거리는 이미 밤이었다.

1000627238.english: - I parked my car in a nearby alley and looked at the large building Tomo was pointing at.
1000627238.korean: - 근처 골목에 차를 세우고 토모가 가리키는 커다란 빌딩을 보았다.

1000627241.english: ...Right, Sherlock. But how do I get in? Sachiko said students weren't allowed in...
1000627241.korean: ...있지, 셜록. 그런데 어떻게 들어가? 사치코가 학생은 못들어간댔는데...

1000627242.english: I need to think about that from now on. I don't necessarily need to include everything.
1000627242.korean: 그걸 지금부터 생각해 봐야지. 꼭 전부 다 들어갈 필요는 없으니까.

1000627244.english: Then... climb up the wall of the building?

1000627246.english: Ahaha, look over there. That grumpy old man is throwing someone!
1000627246.korean: 아하핫, 저기 봐. 험상궂은 아저씨가 누굴 집어던지고 있어!

1000627248.english: - Sherlock was in deep anguish. But this...
1000627248.korean: - 셜록은 깊은 고뇌에 빠졌다. 아니 그런데 이건...

1000627250.english: Huh. It was dark under the lamp.

1000627252.english: But I can't just go in. It seems like a high-class bar.
1000627252.korean: 그래도 그냥은 못 들어갈 거다. 고급 술집인 것 같으니까 말이야.

1000627253.english: If you don't want to get thrown around like that young man over there... wear this.
1000627253.korean: 저기 있는 청년처럼 집어 던져지기 싫으면... 이걸 입도록 해.

1000627254.english: Yeah. I brought it just in case. Keep your head up.
1000627254.korean: 그래. 혹시 몰라서 챙겨왔지. 머리도 좀 세우고.

1000627255.english: People are all about appearances. If something is flashy on the outside, everyone is deceived.
1000627255.korean: 인간은 겉모습이 전부다. 겉만 번지르르하면 전부 다 속아넘어가게 되어 있어.

1000627256.english: Do you know what inner beauty is? Here's wax, a communicator, and a small camera.
1000627256.korean: 내면의 아름다움 같은 거 알까보냐. 여기 왁스랑 통신기, 그리고 소형 카메라다.

1000627258.english: Huh. Go over there and change.

1000627259.english: I've been preparing to hack CCTV for a while now.

1000627261.english: - As Sherlock had boasted, I was able to enter the bar without any resistance at the entrance.
1000627261.korean: - 셜록의 호언장담대로 입구에서 아무런 제지도 받지 않고 술집 안으로 들어올 수 있었다.

1000627262.english: - Under dim lighting, a large number of men and women are sitting at a table, drinking.
1000627262.korean: - 어두운 조명 아래서 수많은 남자와 여자들이 테이블에 앉아 술잔을 기울이고 있다.

1000627263.english: Hey, I'm feeling a little better today. Try to do your best.
1000627263.korean: 이봐, 내가 오늘 기분이 좀 좋거든? 잘 좀 해보라고.

1000627264.english: Oh my. Mr. Okabe, you're so confident today. If you order this, I'll give you a free gift.
1000627264.korean: 어머. 오카베 씨, 오늘따라 자신감 넘치는데? 이거 하나 시켜주면 서비스 해줄게.

1000627265.english: Hahaha. Okay, bring me the most expensive one!
1000627265.korean: 크하핫. 그래, 제일 비싼걸로 가지고 오라고!

1000627267.english: That kid is a Bioroid from our store. Is that okay?
1000627267.korean: 저 아이는 우리 가게 바이오로이드인데 괜찮겠어?

1000627268.english: What? That's the VIP one? It's so fucking expensive. Sigh.
1000627268.korean: 뭐? 저게 그 VIP용이구만? 더럽게 비싸기만 하고 말야. 퉷.

1000627270.english: I'll give you good service, okay?

1000627271.english: - Wherever I went, the situation was similar to what I'd seen earlier. I searched for the people in the photo Kimura had given me amidst the acrid cigarette smoke, but found no results.
1000627271.korean: - 어딜가나 상황은 조금 전에 본 것과 비슷했다. 매캐한 담배 연기 속에서 키무라가 준 사진속 인물들을 찾아봤지만 아무런 성과도 얻을 수 없었다.

1000627272.english: - For a moment, it seemed like a familiar face had passed by.
1000627272.korean: - 순간 익숙한 얼굴이 스쳐지나간 것 같았다.

1000627273.english: - I tried to follow him into the room marked 4, but was stopped by a security guard who said it was a VIP room.
1000627273.korean: - 그를 따라 4라고 적힌 방으로 들어가려다 VIP 룸이라며 경비원에게 제지당하고 말았다.

1000627274.english: I can hear it. CCTV hacking is still ongoing.

1000627277.english: I see... There might not be any CCTV.

1000627278.english: I'll find another way. Just wait a moment.

1000627279.english: - I looked around and headed to a dark corner of the bar.
1000627279.korean: - 주위를 둘러보며 술집의 으슥한 곳으로 향했다.

1000627281.english: - Sherlock took out the small tablet he had handed him along with the camera.
1000627281.korean: - 셜록이 카메라와 함께 건네준 작은 태블릿을 꺼냈다.

1000627282.english: - Let's wait a moment, the image of men sitting together in the room appeared on the screen.
1000627282.korean: - 잠시 기다리자, 방 안에 모여 앉은 남자들의 모습이 화면에 떠올랐다.

1000627283.english: Was that subordinate you met in the military named Wraith? If you had told me sooner, I wouldn't have had to suffer this much.
1000627283.korean: 군에서 만난 부하 이름이 레이스인가? 진작 말해줬으면 지금껏 고생하지도 않았을텐데.

1000627284.english: Well, I see. If even the voice is confidential, there must be a reason.
1000627284.korean: 뭐, 알았다. 목소리까지 기밀일 정도면 사정이 있겠지.

1000627285.english: We'll continue hacking the CCTV footage. The more evidence, the better.
1000627285.korean: 이쪽은 이쪽대로 CCTV를 계속 해킹해보겠다. 증거는 많을 수록 좋으니까.

1000627286.english: Work with your subordinates and contact them if there are any problems.
1000627286.korean: 부하랑 일 진행하고, 문제가 있으면 연락해.

1000627287.english: - After confirming that communication with Sherlock had been cut off, I called Wraith through the communicator I had handed over.
1000627287.korean: - 셜록과의 통신이 끊어진 것을 확인하고, 한쪽을 건네준 통신기를 통해 레이스를 불렀다.

1000627290.english: - The screen moved closer to the men, revealing a man's face that had been obscured by the dim lighting.
1000627290.korean: - 화면이 남자들에게 더 가까워지고, 희미한 조명에 잘 보이지 않던 한 남자의 얼굴이 드러났다.

1000627291.english: - Soon the door opened and another man came in.
1000627291.korean: - 곧 방 문이 열리고, 또다른 남자가 들어왔다.

1000627293.english: Welcome, Kirishima! Are you busy these days? It's hard to see your face.
1000627293.korean: 어서 오게나, 키리시마! 요즘 바쁜가? 얼굴 보기가 힘들군.

1000627294.english: - Even to the House of Representatives, Kirishima...

1000627295.english: Haha. I’ve had a few things to take care of lately.
1000627295.korean: 허허. 제가 요즘 처리할 일들이 좀 생겨서 말입니다.

1000627296.english: As a token of apology... I've prepared something hot.

1000627298.english: - As Kirishima pressed the button on the table, women with identical faces entered the room one after another.
1000627298.korean: - 키리시마가 테이블의 버튼을 누르자 똑같은 얼굴의 여성들이 방 안으로 줄줄이 들어왔다.

1000627299.english: This is a bioroid that I specially commissioned Densetsu to create. I guarantee its performance.
1000627299.korean: 이번에 특별히 덴세츠에 부탁해서 만든 바이오로이드입니다. 성능은 제가 보장하겠습니다.

1000627300.english: Is it okay to do it like last time?

1000627301.english: Of course. It is a humble token of my sincerity, so please feel free to use it to your heart's content, Assemblyman.
1000627301.korean: 물론입니다. 제 보잘것 없는 성의의니, 의원님 마음껏 사용해주지시요.

1000627302.english: Of course, it is fine to treat it roughly, to the point where it can never get up again like last time.
1000627302.korean: 물론, 저번처럼 다시는 못 일어날 정도로 거칠게 다뤄도 문제 없습니다.

1000627303.english: Well then, thank you for your hard work, Mr. Kasasagi. We look forward to your continued support.
1000627303.korean: 자, 카사사기 씨도 수고 많았습니다. 앞으로도 잘 부탁하죠.

1000627304.english: Hahaha. I, Kasasagi, will follow only Council Member Kirishima.
1000627304.korean: 크하하핫. 이 카사사기, 키리시마 의원님만 따르겠습니다.

1000627305.english: I am truly ashamed of my past working with a guy like Hatomori.
1000627305.korean: 하토모리 같은 녀석과 일하던 과거가 정말 부끄럽습니다.

1000627306.english: Hahaha. Well, well... seeing you change your mind, Mr. Kasasagi, you've really become a politician. You really should get a seat in the assembly someday.
1000627306.korean: 허허허. 이거이거... 말을 바꾸시는 걸 보니 카사사기 씨도 정치인이 다 되셨군요. 나중에 의원 자리라도 하나 하셔야겠어요.

1000627307.english: Oh my, you are too kind.

1000627308.english: It is an honor for me simply to serve as Representative Kirishima’s shadow warrior.
1000627308.korean: 저는 그저, 키리시마 의원님의 그림자무사가 되어 헌신하는 것 만으로도 영광이지요.

1000627309.english: Hahaha. Since the great Kasasagi said that, I really feel like I have gained an army of thousands.
1000627309.korean: 으하하하하. 천하의 카사사기가 그렇게 말해주니 정말 천군만마를 얻은 것 같습니다.

1000627311.english: - As Kirishima raised the bottle, Kasasagi respectfully held the glass with both hands.
1000627311.korean: - 키리시마가 술병을 들자 카사사기는 두 손으로 공손히 잔을 들었다.

1000627312.english: But seriously, is it really necessary for someone destined for great things to be wearing such a scratched watch?
1000627312.korean: 아니 그런데, 장차 큰 일을 하실 분이 그렇게 흠집 난 시계를 차고 계셔야 되겠습니까?

1000627314.english: To be honest, this watch was given to me by that guy Hatomori. Considering how expensive it was, I didn't really like it, so I treated it roughly, and before I knew it, it ended up like this.
1000627314.korean: 다름이 아니라, 이 시계는 하토모리 녀석이 준 것인데, 비싼 것 치곤 영 마음에 안들어서 막 다루다보니 어느새 이렇게 됐지 말입니다.

1000627315.english: I hadn't even thought about it, but thanks to you, Assemblyman, I remembered. I will throw it away right away. Ugh...!
1000627315.korean: 신경도 안 쓰고 있었는데, 의원님 덕분에 기억이 났습니다. 어서 버리도록 하겠습니다. 에잉...!

1000627316.english: Hahaha. Still, shouldn't I have a watch right now?
1000627316.korean: 으허허헛. 그래도 당장 시계는 있어야 하지 않겠습니까.

1000627317.english: Please bear with me for just a few more days. I will soon send you a wonderful watch that suits you, Mr. Kasasagi.
1000627317.korean: 며칠만 더 참으시지요. 제가 곧, 카사사기 씨에게 어울리는 근사한 시계를 하나 보내드리겠습니다.

1000627318.english: Oh my, to that extent! I am truly sorry.

1000627319.english: Come to think of it, Kirishima-kun. Do you remember the contract with Densetsu last time?
1000627319.korean: 그리고보니 키리시마 군. 저번 덴세츠와의 계약 건, 기억하나?

1000627320.english: It seems the military is satisfied as well. They said they want to buy more of those Black River bioroids.
1000627320.korean: 군에서도 만족스러운 모양이야. 그 블랙리버산 바이오로이드들을 더 사고 싶다더군.

1000627321.english: Ah, is that so? I'm glad things worked out well. I will contact Densetsu. And...
1000627321.korean: 아, 그렇습니까. 일이 잘 풀려서 다행이군요. 제가 덴세츠와 접촉해 보겠습니다. 그리고...

1000627322.english: Actually, regarding that matter, I received a lot of help from Mr. Kasasagi here. Especially regarding the handling of that Hatomori guy.
1000627322.korean: 실은 그 건과 관련해서, 여기 카사사기 씨의 도움을 많이 받았습니다. 특히 하토모리 녀석의 처리와 관련해서 말입니다.

1000627323.english: So that's how it was! If I hadn't heard it from you, I wouldn't have known either.
1000627323.korean: 그런거였나! 자네에게 안들었으면 나도 모를 뻔 했어.

1000627324.english: You're really getting more and more involved. Kirishima, you won't be Prime Minister for very long. Huh?
1000627324.korean: 이거, 점점 발이 넓어지는구만. 키리시마 군, 총리대신도 얼마 안 남았어. 응?

1000627326.english: Oh dear, both of your glasses are empty! I’ll treat you to a drink this time.
1000627326.korean: 어이쿠, 두 분 잔이 비었잖습니까! 이번엔 제가 한 잔 올리겠습니다.

1000627327.english: - While I was intently watching the screen, someone grabbed my shoulder.
1000627327.korean: - 화면을 집중해서 보던 중에 누군가 내 어깨를 잡았다.

1000627328.english: Excuse me. We received a report that something is suspicious—

1000627329.english: - The man's gaze turned to the tablet I was holding.
1000627329.korean: - 남자의 시선이 내가 들고 있는 태블릿으로 향했다.

1000627330.english: - Naturally, on the tablet screen were images of men laughing heartily and raising their glasses.
1000627330.korean: - 당연히 태블릿 화면에는 호탕하게 웃으며 술잔을 기울이는 남자들의 모습

1000627331.english: ...You will need to accompany me for a moment.

1000627332.english: - Damn it... What should I do?

1000627334.english: - She offered a sincere apology and then kicked the man hard in the groin.
1000627334.korean: - 진심을 담은 사과를 건네며 남자의 사타구니를 힘껏 걷어찼다.

1000627336.english: Hey, that bastard... catch that bastard...!

1000627337.english: - Just as the tablet screen seemed to go blurry for a moment, the man collapsed forward as if he had been struck hard on the back of the neck.
1000627337.korean: - 태블릿 화면이 순간 흐릿해지나 싶더니, 남자가 뒷목에 강한 충격을 받은 듯이 앞으로 쓰러졌다.

1000627338.english: - But as the man fell, he knocked over a pile of liquor bottles that had been stacked nearby.
1000627338.korean: - 하지만 남자가 쓰러지며 옆에 쌓여있던 술병 무더기를 쓰러뜨리고 말았다.

1000627339.english: - A loud bang filled the bar, drowning out the music and people's conversations.
1000627339.korean: - 음악소리와 사람들의 이야깃소리를 덮을 정도로 큰 와장창 소리가 술집 안에 퍼졌다.

1000627340.english: - All eyes turned to the man who had collapsed, battered and bruised, and to me standing before him, and men dressed just like him began to approach from all directions.
1000627340.korean: - 이내 만신창이가 되어 쓰러진 남자와 그 앞에 서있는 나에게 온 시선이 집중되고, 곳곳에서 쓰러진 남자와 같은 차림을 한 남자들이 다가왔다.

1000627341.english: Ah... Commander. This is what I was going for...

1000627342.english: - What should I do with this...

1000627344.english: So, our boss got hit with Origin Dust and became incredibly young?
1000627344.korean: 그러니까, 우리 보스가 오리진 더스트를 맞고 엄청 젊어졌다니까?

1000627345.english: Wow, the boss is a reinforced human?

1000627346.english: Yeah. I don't think there's much difference between enhanced humans and Bioroids hit by Origin Dust. Even machines can't tell the difference, right?
1000627346.korean: 그래. 내 생각엔 오리진 더스트 맞은 강화 인간들이나 바이오로이드랑 별 차이가 없는 것 같아. 기계도 구분 못한다니까?

1000627347.english: Really? I think Bioroids are just like humans!
1000627347.korean: 그래? 나는 바이오로이드도 인간이랑 똑같다고 생각해!

1000627348.english: What? Hahaha, this is a funny girl!

1000627349.english: Tomo! Stop playing around and come here! I think we're in big trouble!
1000627349.korean: 토모! 그만 놀고 이리와봐! 큰일 난 것 같아!

1000627352.english: I just hacked the CCTV and now it's chaos inside!

1000627717.english: - I couldn't help but smile bitterly at Vanilla's words.
1000627717.korean: - 바닐라의 말에 나는 쓴웃음을 지을 수밖에 없었다.

1000627718.english: - It's true that a past record I saw in a castle a while ago kept messing with my mind.
1000627718.korean: - 얼마 전에 어떤 성에서 본 과거의 기록이 자꾸 머릿속을 어지럽히고 있었던 게 사실이니까.

1000627719.english: - Are you in your room now?

1000627720.english: - I got up from my seat and came to Aurora's room.
1000627720.korean: - 그대로 자리에서 일어나 아우로라의 방으로 왔다.

1000627721.english: - I pressed the call button and waited for a while, but there was no response. I heard they were taking a break after they brought me lunch dessert...
1000627721.korean: - 호출 버튼을 누르고 한동안 기다려도 반응이 없다. 점심 디저트를 가져다 준 후엔 쉰다고 들은 것 같은데...

1000627722.english: - I want to have a proper conversation as soon as possible, but I don't want to get distracted somewhere else.
1000627722.korean: - 가급적 빨리 제대로 이야기를 나누고 싶은데 딴 데서 엇갈려버리면 안되니까 말야.

1000627723.english: - The moment I rationalized like that and opened the door to Aurora's room.
1000627723.korean: - 그렇게 합리화하며 아우로라의 방 문을 연 순간.

1000627724.english: - I felt dizzy from the scent that came from inside.
1000627724.korean: - 안에서 확 끼쳐온 향기에 정신이 아찔해졌다.

1000627725.english: - I'm used to the sweet scent that Aurora always carries around, but what permeates this place where I always stay is beyond my imagination.
1000627725.korean: - 아우로라가 언제나 휘감고 다니는 달콤한 향기에는 이제 익숙해졌지만, 항상 지내는 이곳에 배어 있는 것은 상상 이상이었다.

1000627726.english: - I felt my body temperature rise slightly and walked cautiously into the room.
1000627726.korean: - 살짝 체온이 오르는 것을 느끼며 조심스럽게 방 안으로 걸음을 옮겼다.

1000627727.english: - In the small room, there was a small desk and... a bed.
1000627727.korean: - 넒지 않은 방 안에는 작은 책상과... 침대.

1000627728.english: - No. Come to your senses. That's clearly a sweet, devilish temptation that you can't escape once you step inside.
1000627728.korean: - 안 돼. 정신 차리자. 저건 분명 한 번 발을 들이면 헤어나올 수 없는 달콤한 악마의 유혹.

1000627729.english: - I shook my head to shake off my distracting thoughts, but I felt like I was being dragged towards the bed.
1000627729.korean: - 고개를 저어 잡념을 떨쳐내려 했지만, 나는 끌려가듯 침대 쪽으로 향했다.

1000627730.english: - Calming my troubles, I slumped down onto a chair.

1000627731.english: - As my nose got used to it, my rapidly beating heart soon calmed down.
1000627731.korean: - 코가 익숙해졌는지 빨라져가던 심장 박동도 이내 진정되었다.

1000627732.english: - I was aimlessly looking around the room, which didn't have much to see, when I discovered a wad of paper sticking out from under the pillow.
1000627732.korean: - 별로 볼 것도 없는 방 안을 공연히 둘러보다가, 베개 밑으로 삐져나와있는 종이 뭉치를 발견했다.

1000627733.english: - I sat down on the crumpled blanket, which looked like it had been tidied up just enough.
1000627733.korean: - 적당히 치운듯, 구겨져있는 이불 위에 걸터앉았다.

1000627734.english: - As the scent grew deeper, I unconsciously collapsed onto the bed.
1000627734.korean: - 그러자 더욱 깊어지는 향기에, 나도 모르게 침대에 쓰러지듯 누웠다.

1000627735.english: - sweet scent envelops me, as if embracing me.
1000627735.korean: - 마치 품어주는 것처럼, 달콤한 향기가 나를 감싼다.

1000627736.english: - However, it is still not enough.

1000627737.english: - It was only after pulling the covers over me that my soul could be satisfied. I decided to relax my body and savor the feeling of happiness.
1000627737.korean: - 이불까지 덮고 나서야 내 영혼은 만족할 수 있었다. 몸에서 힘을 빼며 행복감을 만끽하기로 했다.

1000627738.english: - But who said it? That human greed knows no bounds.
1000627738.korean: - 그러나 누가 말했던가. 인간의 욕심은 끝이 없다고.

1000627739.english: - My soul tasted what it should not have. In the end...
1000627739.korean: - 내 영혼은 맛봐선 안되는 것을 맛보고 말았다. 결국...

1000627740.english: - I threw off the blanket and sat up as if springing. I could feel a streak of cold sweat running down my back.
1000627740.korean: - 튕기듯 이불을 젖히고 몸을 일으켰다. 등에 흐르는 한 줄기 식은땀이 느껴진다.

1000627741.english: - Grateful for regaining my senses before anything irreversible happened, I moved to a chair when I discovered a wad of paper sticking out from under the pillow.
1000627741.korean: - 돌이킬 수 없는 일이 벌어지기 전에 제정신이 돌아온 것에 감사하며 의자로 자리를 옮기던 중, 베개 밑으로 삐져나온 종이 뭉치를 발견했다.

1000627742.english: - I could tell with just a quick glance. It is a record I saw a while ago at the Chocolate Queen's castle.
1000627742.korean: - 슬쩍만 봐도 알 수 있었다. 내가 얼마 전, 초코 여왕의 성에서 본 기록이다.

1000627743.english: - I finally understand Aurora's behavior. Having been restored only recently, it would be too much for her to accept that fact—that she and her fellow models were not even treated as living beings.
1000627743.korean: - 이제야 아우로라의 행동이 이해됐다. 복원된지 얼마 되지 않은 상태에서 그런 기록을, 자신과 동형의 모델들이 생물 취급도 받지 못했다는 사실을 받아들이기에는 무리가 있다.

1000627744.english: - All that remains is to consult with Aurora and slowly build a relationship of trust. The sooner I move, the better.
1000627744.korean: - 남은 건 아우로라와 상담하며 천천히 신뢰관계를 쌓는 일 뿐이다. 빠르게 움직일수록 좋겠지.

1000627745.english: - Still, I think it's better to wait in the room.

1000627746.english: - I waited in the room for a while, but Aurora did not come.
1000627746.korean: - 한동안 방에서 기다렸지만, 아우로라는 오지 않았다.

1000627747.english: - Eventually, it was time for dinner, so I trudged back to my room.
1000627747.korean: - 결국 저녁식사 시간이 되어 터덜터덜 내 방으로 돌아왔다.

1000627748.english: Have you come? I was just about to go look for you.

1000627749.english: No, sir. I will bring out the dish again.

1000627753.english: - That’s perfect timing. I decided to ask Sowon about Aurora while we ate.
1000627753.korean: - 마침 잘됐군. 식사를 하며 소완에게 아우로라에 대해 물어보기로 했다.

1000627754.english: No, Your Majesty. I was told they have business to attend to, so I have agreed to prepare dessert for dinner.
1000627754.korean: 아니옵니다. 볼일이 있다고하여 저녁 후식은 소첩이 맡기로 하였사옵니다.

1000627755.english: - This is the first time I've seen Aurora take a break from kitchen work...

1000627756.english: So, Master, have you noticed as well?

1000627757.english: Miss Aurora, I have been going through a very difficult time lately. It is to the point where I cannot even properly concentrate on my kitchen duties.
1000627757.korean: 아우로라 양, 요새 마음 고생이 심하옵니다. 주방일에도 제대로 집중하지 못할 정도이옵니다.

1000627758.english: I, your humble servant, have also suffered heartache over a similar matter, so I could not bring myself to rebuke you.
1000627758.korean: 소첩도 비슷한 일로 가슴앓이를 해보았기에, 차마 질책할 수가 없었사옵니다.

1000627759.english: However, thanks to you, Master, I was able to lay down the burden on my heart.
1000627759.korean: 하오나 소첩은 주인 덕분에 마음의 짐을 내려 놓을 수 있었사옵니다.

1000627760.english: Please bestow your grace upon Miss Aurora as well.

1000627761.english: - The mental care of the troops is ultimately my responsibility as the commander.
1000627761.korean: - 대원들의 멘탈 케어는 궁극적으로 사령관인 내 책임이다.

1000627762.english: - Whether it’s a misguided mindset like Sowon’s or matters related to the past like Aurora’s, I guess I’ll have to resolve it all.
1000627762.korean: - 소완처럼 어긋난 마음가짐이든, 아우로라처럼 과거에 관련된 일이든 전부 내가 해결해야겠지.

1000627763.english: Hehe. That is a wise decision.

1000627764.english: Still, please try the dessert I made.
1000627764.korean: 그래도 소첩이 만든 후식은 맛보아 주시지요.

1000627765.english: - I quickly finished the dessert Sowon had prepared and set out to find Aurora.
1000627765.korean: - 소완이 준비해준 디저트를 후다닥 해치우고 아우로라를 찾아나섰다.
